title: Login page crashes on Safari
description: Users on Safari 16 experience a white screen when submitting the login form. The console shows a JavaScript TypeError related to optional chaining.

title: Add dark mode support
description: Product request: implement a dark mode toggle across the entire application. Should persist user preference in localStorage.

title: Export to CSV not working
description: The CSV export button on the reports page triggers a download but the file is empty. Tested on Chrome and Firefox.

title: Dashboard charts not loading
description: After the latest deployment, the bar chart on the dashboard shows a spinner indefinitely. API returns 200 but chart canvas stays blank.

title: Add bulk delete feature
description: Users want to select multiple records and delete them in one action. This should include a confirmation dialog before deletion.

title: Password reset email not sent
description: When a user clicks 'Forgot Password', they don't receive an email. The backend logs show the SMTP connection timing out.

title: Improve pagination UX
description: The pagination controls are hard to use on mobile. Buttons are too small and there's no jump-to-page input.

title: API rate limit errors in production
description: High traffic is causing 429 errors from the API. The global rate limit of 200 req/15min is being hit during peak hours.

title: Tooltip missing on action buttons
description: The view, edit, and delete buttons in the list table have no tooltips. Users are unsure what each icon does.

title: Broken image URLs in profile
description: Profile avatars show a broken image icon. The image URLs are using HTTP instead of HTTPS causing mixed-content blocking.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts
description: Power users have requested keyboard shortcuts for common actions: Ctrl+N to create, Ctrl+F to search, Escape to close modals.

title: Session expires without warning
description: JWT access tokens expire after 15 minutes with no warning. Users lose unsaved form data. Need a 2-minute expiry warning banner.

title: Table rows not scrollable on mobile
description: The data table overflows on screens smaller than 768px and there is no horizontal scroll. Content is hidden.

title: Loading spinner shows forever on error
description: When an API call fails, the full-page loader stays on screen and never dismisses. The app becomes completely unusable.

title: Form validation messages unclear
description: Validation error messages are generic (e.g. 'This field is required'). Need field-specific messages like 'Student ID must start with STU'.

title: Implement audit log for changes
description: For compliance, every create/update/delete action should be logged with user, timestamp, and before/after values.

title: Search not finding partial matches
description: Searching for 'Joh' should return 'John' but the search is doing an exact match instead of a substring match.

title: Notification bell count doesn't reset
description: The unread notification count badge doesn't clear when the user opens the notification panel.

title: Add role-based access control
description: Currently all logged-in users see the same interface. Need to restrict certain pages (e.g. Settings, Delete) to admin role only.

title: Date formatting inconsistent
description: Some dates display as MM/DD/YYYY and others as DD-MM-YYYY across different pages. Should use a single consistent format.

title: Performance degradation with 1000+ records
description: When the JSON data file has over 1000 records, list page load time exceeds 3 seconds. Need server-side pagination optimization.

title: Improve error messages from API
description: When the server returns a 500 error, the UI shows a generic message. The actual error reason should be shown in dev mode.

title: Add CSV import for bulk records
description: Support uploading a CSV file to create multiple records at once. Should validate each row and report errors per row.

title: Broken confirm dialog on delete
description: The confirmation dialog for deletion sometimes appears behind the main modal, making it impossible to confirm or cancel.

title: Refresh token not invalidated on logout
description: After logging out, the refresh token is not removed from the server store, which means it could still be used to obtain new access tokens.

title: copilot not working
description: copilot not working
